name: Wings of Flying
description: While wearing this cloak, you can take a Magic action to turn the cloak into a pair of wings on your back.

transformation.effect: Cloak becomes pair of wings on back
transformation.duration: 1 hour or until you end effect as Magic action

flight.falling: If aloft when wings disappear, you fall

recharge.duration: Can't use again for 1d12 hours after wings disappear
